form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of five months. Finished off last campaign recording by a 0.8 m (Sr5) at Ashburton Raceway (2:04.30) beating Nothing But You in on November 13 at $3.30 at the bell was 4th-6m 3WNC. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 19 m win (Fr1) at Ashburton Raceway (3:04.70) beating Rockin Roman in 3yo+ on August 31 at $2.20. Rates highly. Should be in the finish.
